summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is recommended.

actions.reason: Focused contributor PR with failed proof gate and no duplicate/supersession evidence; keep as independent backlog work.
Maintainer-owned PR waiting on author; next decision is maintainer/author follow-up rather than inventory cleanup.
Behavioral message-delivery PR with failed checks and bot review signal; maintainer technical judgment is required.
Small contributor docs PR with supplied proof and green docs checks; low-signal closeout is disabled, so maintainer review is the remaining decision.
Substantive focused contributor fix appears ready for maintainer review, but merge/fix is out of scope and correctness requires human judgment.

needs_human: #87955 maintainer-owned PR is waiting on author/maintainer follow-up.
#88084 requires maintainer technical judgment because it changes approval command routing, has failed checks, and has a Codex bot review comment.
#88103 needs maintainer review of the docs/package-state claim; low-signal closeout is disabled.
#88159 needs maintainer review for a green, focused CLI bug fix with compatibility risk.
